verificationNote: AI-generated SOC 2 readiness assessment template. Organizations should work with their CPA firm to validate scope and criteria.
title: SOC 2 Type II Readiness Assessment Template
description: Checklist template for assessing organizational readiness for a SOC 2 Type II examination.

items.item: Determine report type (Type I vs Type II) and observation period
Select Trust Services Categories in scope (Security + optional categories)
Define system boundaries and system description scope
Identify and engage CPA firm
Identify subservice organizations and determine carve-out vs inclusive method
Code of conduct published and acknowledged by all personnel
Board/management oversight structure documented
Organizational chart with security roles defined
Security awareness training program operational
Risk assessment completed and documented
Access control policies documented and enforced
MFA implemented for production and remote access
User access reviews conducted quarterly
Change management process implemented with approvals and testing
Security monitoring (SIEM) deployed and operational
Incident response plan documented and tested
Encryption implemented for data at rest and in transit
Vulnerability management program operational
Capacity monitoring and alerting configured
DR/BCP plans documented with defined RTO/RPO
DR test conducted and documented within last 12 months
System description drafted covering all required sections
Control matrix mapping controls to TSC criteria
Evidence collection process established for observation period
CUECs (Complementary User Entity Controls) identified and documented
